text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our tumultuous summer camp, marked by
Matikanefukukitaru's mad pursuit of good luck,
has come to a close.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Thank you so much, Trainer! I had a miraculous
time, thanks to your support!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Actually, there's one more thing I want to ask
you. I tried plucking flower petals to predict my
future a minute ago.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
"I will succeed in the Kikuka Sho," "I won't
succeed." You know, that kind of thing.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
And you know what? The last petal told me I'll
succeed!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I thought so too... But once I saw the carnage
wrought on the chrysanthemum petals by my
hands, I started to think otherwise...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
So, what's the final result? A good omen or a bad
one? I'm not sure...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We still don't know the answer—but our exciting
and nerve-racking path toward the fall Classics
continues.
